title: Wireless Design, Configuration, and Validation · PBQ Checkpoint
summary: Design staff, guest, and point-to-point wireless service across crowded, regulated, and mobile spaces. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a secure wireless survey and deployment plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare relevant 802.11 capabilities across 2.4, 5, and 6 GHz bands, channel availability, range, and client support.
Choose channel, width, reuse, and band steering from regulatory domain, overlap, contention, capacity, and coverage.
Distinguish SSID, BSSID, ESS, hidden names, and client discovery without treating an SSID as a security control.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Net Wifi Standards Bands · changed case
steps.instruction:
Use a changed quiz case derived from this module: network wireless. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: required

options.text: Run the boundary case, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.
Accept the result because visible output is the highest authority.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Net Wireless Survey Roaming applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Perform predictive and measured surveys and verify RSSI, SNR, interference, utilization, roaming, and application outcomes.
